item.title: Cosy Cafe жё©йҰЁе’–е•ЎйҰҶ
item.description:
Cosy Cafe [v0.13.1 Public] [Cosy Creator]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ

  • Your rough childhood is over, and you stand on the precipice of adulthood with a singular goal in mind: To become an exceptional restaurateur like your grandfather. But for now, you’ll settle for building a modest cafe. Money is tight, and challenges abound balancing your dream with your final year of school, but with hard work and determination you know that you can build a life for yourself and the girls you meet along the way.

  • In Cosy Cafe you will develop romantic and increasingly sexual relationships with a number of girls, culminating in a harem that eventually becomes a family. There will be a particular focus on wholesome maledom, and of course, there will be a lot of loving and kinky sex!

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡHoney Select 2
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡ0.13.1 Public
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2025-11-28

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—
  • Multiple typos and a couple of missing dialogue lines that were added back in.
  • Fixed bug where train sounds kept playing after Akatsuki’s date
  • Fixed rare crashing problem on the save/load screen (temporarily disabled the save page number bar at the bottom scrolling while I work on a more permanent fix)
  • Fixed Annabelle’s page in the replay gallery - this was added in 0.12.1 then accidentally reverted in 0.13.0
  • Fixed related bug on android where the group scenes in the gallery displayed as Annabelle scenes Fixed bug in the android version where about a dozen of the videos had weird transparent cropping on the edges
  • Updated the patch version to fix an issue with pre-0.13 videos flashing up a transparency page when patching from 0.12.0 instead of 0.12.1

DeveloperпјҲе…ҘжӯЈең°еқҖпјү

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord

item.title: Isekai Paradise ејӮдё–з•ҢеӨ©е Ӯ
item.description:
Isekai Paradise [v0.7 Patreon] [Soultice]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Just after graduating college, your life wasnвҖҷt going so great… No job, no prospects, and then… a truck. Yep, you die in a car accident by a truck-kun. But instead of staying dead, you wake up in Evenralm, a fantasy world full of magic, monsters, and adventures just like manga or anime.
  • With a new lease on life, youвҖҷre ready to chase your wildest dream: becoming the Harem King and taking down the Demon Lord! Along the way, youвҖҷll gather a diverse group of amazing women from all corners of Evenralm… Humans, elves, demons, dragons, and more to join you on your lewd adventure.вҖӢ

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: Realm Invader йўҶеҹҹе…ҘдҫөиҖ…
item.description:
Realm Invader [Ep.2 P2] [Invader Gary]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In this game, you follow a young soulless shell for you to self-insert into man who lives in a world very similar to yours. Recently, he’s been riddled with several mysterious ailments, including headaches, goosebumps, and an inexplicable sense of dread.
  • These symptoms were a warning, this man finds himself in the middle of a cataclysmic event, at least, it would seem so. Where cataclysms will typically lead to the destruction of a world, this one has led to a birth. The nature of his world has shifted around him. There are new species, an altered society, and magic.
  • He needs to learn about his new circumstances and what he can do with his new magical abilities. This man will slowly come to realize why he was sent to this world and walks a journey to unravel the mystery of his existence.
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • Oh, yeah, and he fucks a bunch of people on the way.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: ToxiCity жҜ’жҖ§
item.description:
ToxiCity [v0.16.0] [ILSProductions]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • It rolled in slowly. In a town in its off-season, no one noticed when the city streets grew empty. No one thought twice about it when people called in sick. And then, while at work, John and his coworker, Kallie, witness an unusual fog surrounding their office. Cellphone service stopped. Phone lines went dead. Almost immediately, they lost contact with the outside world. When they went out to investigate, the fog burned their exposed skin and made them sick. Stranded, they have to find out whatвҖҷs happening and how they might be rescued.вҖӢ

item.title: The Headmaster ж Ўй•ҝе…Ҳз”ҹ
item.description:
The Headmaster [v0.17.2.1] [Altos and Herdone]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In the not too distant future, on a small island nation, a crisis has arisen. The number of students graduating from school has fallen sharply and university places are going unfilled. Faced with the prospect of mass unemployment and potential economic disaster the government is forced to introduce emergency measures. All students over eighteen who failed or were expelled from school are to be forced back into education at a number of special facilities.
Spoiler: More
  • In The Headmaster you play an expert in young adult psychology with some unique ideas about how to tackle the crisis. After a demonstration of your theories at a teachers conference you are approached by the agent of a mysterious organisation. He invites you to interview for the position of headmaster (principal) at one of the newly founded schools for over eighteen year olds. Keen to prove yourself and your theories you gladly accept.
  • Using your unique disciplinary methods you must turn a whole school of delinquent young women into hard working and obedient students. Things will not be easy for you. You must win your colleagues to your side, cater to the unusual demands of the schools owners and deal with a troublesome government inspector.

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ

item.title: Murmur дҪҺиҜӯ
item.description:
Murmur [v0.7 Hotfix] [Devil’s Dad]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • It is a story about love and lust in our lives, about what their absence leads to and what forms they can take. In this game, you’ll be playing as a 29-year-old guy who gets involved in unexpected mystical events. His life gets turned on its head and he has to survive in the new world he’s found himself in. But it’s not as grim as it seems at first glance. As you play, you’ll meet girls who need you just like you need them. Will you make them yours, seduce them, or cherish and love them? It’s up to you. Each of them has their own background, character, and hidden fetishes…вҖӢ

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡHoney Select 2
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡ0.7 Public Hotfix
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2025-05-15

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—
  • Fixed the error message that appeared while telling Sophie the truth If you experience an error on launch with “File “game/definitions.rpy”, line 180” - Please redownload the game
  • New content: story continuation after the date with Yui
  • New UI design: main menu, load\save menu, settings, new music credits, updated gallery, dialogue window, choice menu and love menu with girls points
  • New visual notifications for love\lewd points and other info
  • New section called “Other” for the gallery, and new wallpapers and arts in corresponding sections
  • Love menu now contains “events” that had place in your playthrough, but for old save not all previous events will be displayed, it’s not critical, but if you want to see all “events” listed there you’ll need to start new game
  • Save\load pages now remember your scroll position, just as gallery will remember what page you were on
  • Bug and other fixes

DeveloperпјҲе…ҘжӯЈең°еқҖпјү

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

item.description:
Waifu Academy [v0.13.5] [Irphaeus]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In Waifu Academy, you play as young man (with a name of your choice, of course), who wishes to seek revenge after many years of harrowing ordeals… The game features more than 30 characters, each of which is unique and has a (hopefully) believable background. Most of the game scenes take place at a fictional private high school called, ‘Sazaki Academy.

item.title: Companion of Darkness й»‘жҡ—дјҙдҫЈ
item.description:
Companion of Darkness [S2 Ch.12] [Berkili4]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • 3 years after a tragic incident, you return to your hometown. Just before you reach your destination, you watch as two supernatural forces pit their strength against each other in a fight to the death.
  • It seems that you have been discovered and effortlessly overwhelmed, but instead of dying you wake up in your bed as if nothing had happened.
  • Was it all a dream?
  • Everyday life goes on whether you like it to or not. Not only do you feel like a stranger in your hometown, more and more unexplainable events are happening around you.
  • When the ones you care for are threatened, you must decide which boundaries you are willing to cross. And, if it is worth to give up humanity.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ

  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡSeason 2 - Chapter 12
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2025-12-17

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—

item.title: Sinful Summer еӨҸж—Ҙе°Ҹж•…дәӢ
item.description:
Sinful Summer: A Tale of Forbidden Love [Ch.3.5] [Ruykiru]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Embark on an unforgettable journey with Erik and Lyna, two young twins entangled in a passionate web of desires. Set against the breathtaking backdrop of a private tropical island villa, their reunion after a year abroad sparks a fiery exploration of emotions that defy traditional boundaries.
  • As they tread the line between repressed feelings and mutual attraction, their bond deepens and the craving for the forbidden becomes impossible to ignore. With the arrival of their mother Helga on the horizon, will they succumb to temptation or resist the call of their primal urges? Discover the twists and turns of this compelling narrative through a kinetic visual novel where love, family, and desire intertwine in very interesting ways…
  • DISCLAIMER: THIS IS NOT A GAME, IT’S A VISUAL NOVEL WITHOUT CHOICES.
  • Think of it as a book, TV show or movie, but with lots of porn. Also this is NOT your usual incest story about a mindless poorly-written harem. It has a big focus on the taboo itself and making the family relationships mean something more than just a label. Expect very heavy incestuous dialogue here, without any stupid censorship patches. Also lesbian scenes and both male and female protags.

item.title: The Veil её·е№•
item.description:
The Veil [v0.3.6] [Mr.Shaxy]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You transfer to a university for your sophomore year to start life with a clean slate. A new city, new people, new - - opportunitiesвҖ”it seems like everything is falling into place perfectly.
  • But already in the first week, something starts to go wrong.
  • Strangers stare at you too intently.
  • Conversations overheard by chance, cut short when you approach.
  • Suspicious documents that shouldn’t exist.
  • This university has dark secrets. Some students know more than they let on. Teachers pretend not to notice anything. And those who ask too many questions… disappear.
  • Someone is watching you.
  • Someone is manipulating events.
  • Someone has already decided your fate.
  • Can you get to the bottom of the truth? And most importantly, will you still be alive when you find out?

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: Agent17 зү№е·Ҙ17
item.description:
Agent17 [v0.26.10] [HEXATAIL]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You are an ordinary-looking pervert with average grades, blending into the background at school without anyone paying much attention to you. Occasionally, you may face bullying from troublemakers, possibly even being robbed or coerced into doing their bidding. However, one fateful day while heading home, you stumble upon a damaged phone. The phone initiated transformation in your life.
Spoiler: More

  • This phone has the power to solve all your problems. Contrary to popular belief, an unknown individual called Agent17 obeys the commands of whoever picks up the phone, allowing you to instruct her to carry out any task. Suddenly, your life takes a dramatic turn for the better. You triumph over the bullies who tormented you, and you exact revenge on the teachers and principals who held you in contempt.

  • The mundane school life that once held no interest for you begins to change as you start interacting with a multitude of talented and captivating individuals. As your connections deepen, you gradually uncover their hidden secrets. With the formidable abilities of Agent17 at your disposal, you also delve into their unknown mysteries. Moreover, you realize that your life is brimming with countless fascinating discoveries awaiting your exploration.

item.title: Contagion Crisis дј жҹ“еҚұжңә
item.description:
Contagion Crisis [v0.6.0] [WeLoveMonsters]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ

  • Contagion Crisis is an adult monster survival-horror kinetic novel heavily influenced by games such as Resident Evil, Parasite Eve, and more.

  • In 2018, a contagion escapes into the city of Grimhaven, Washington, turning everything it touches into lust-fueled monsters. Sisters, Sarah and Ava, must traverse the city, doing their best to avoid the mutations as they attempt to reach sanctuary. Through their journey, the pair will seek the truth of the contagion’s outbreak; a task that will require them to unravel a web of lies that will change them both forever.вҖӢ

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: Phoenixes еҮӨеҮ°
item.description:
Phoenixes [v16.0.0] [NoMeme]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The story of PHOENIXES takes place in a world where both magic and science are well developed, a world where the superhero is really a thing. You, a wanderer in the junction between light and shadow, are now dragged into the cusp of the fight between heroes and villains. The city is falling apart and justice is being corrupted, you will have to take the responsibility and вҖҰ вҖҰ вҖҰ вҖҰ
  • Nah, that sounds boring, why donвҖҷt you just enjoy an easy life in this urban fantasy world and get all the hot strong beauties in your harem no matter whether they are heroes or villains? That solves the fight too, right?вҖӢ

item.title: Fleeting Memories жөҒиҝһеҝҶеҫҖжҳ”
item.description:
Fleeting Memories [v0.4.6] [Lyrical Artistry]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Get ready for a romantic noir journey, as you take on the role of a private detective living with your childhood sweetheart, aka best friend. One day, when your newest neighbor comes to you with a personal request, you’re quickly thrust into your next case. The past and present unravels as you try to crack the unsolved mystery of her sister’s death. Not to mention, the possibility of a new romance as well. Will you keep things strictly professional? Or is there room for some new love in your life? What about your childhood friend? Follow your instincts and witness where this thrilling journey takes you.вҖӢ

item.title: Cross Realms и·Ёз•Ң
item.description:
Cross Realms [v0.4Public] [DuskDuck]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • On the first day of your college life, you and a group of friends are sucked into a vortex. When you wake up, you realize you’re in a foreign place - this is not Earth. As you explore this new world, you discover it’s a Qi cultivation realm, where power determines everything.
Spoiler

  • There are nine Realms, each controlled by a dominant race: Humans, Demons, Deities, Spiritual Beasts, and more. Each Realm has a “spring” - a flow of Qi energy harvested from the Void, the space between Realms. Because of these springs, peace between the Realms is fragile and rarely lasts long. You arrive during the longest period of peace ever known, but how long will this so-called ‘peace’ really last?

  • As your journey continues, you uncover more secrets about these Realms. Someone in the shadows has been plotting and orchestrating your arrival. Will you be able to stand up for yourself in a world where many see you as nothing more than a useless ant?

  • The answer are yours to find.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: Eternum ж°ёжҒ’дё–з•Ң
item.description:
Eternum [v0.9.5 Public] [Caribdis]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • YouвҖҷre moving with your best friend to the city of Kredon, home to some of the best schools and universities in the country, to continue your studies. However, in Kredon, thereвҖҷs only one thing everyone talks about: ETERNUMвҖ”the virtual, hyper-reality MMORPG game released a few years ago that revolutionized the world of technology.
Spoiler
  • With a neural implant that recreates the five senses, it becomes impossible to distinguish between the game and the real world. Thousands of servers form the network of Eternum: from colorful, magic-filled fantasy worlds to foggy sci-fi cities, no world is beyond reach. Nevertheless, looking beyond the surface, there’s a darker side to this pretty facade: black markets, torture, rape, illegal content trafficking, unlawful assemblies, data theftвҖҰ Eternum follows the rules of no man. For some reason, governments turn a blind eye to this; thereвҖҷs no regulation and no control. Some say itвҖҷs because the game is highly addictive, some say itвҖҷs because the market moves millions of dollars daily, some say those in power have been bribed, and others sayвҖҰ thereвҖҷs something else going on. And you? WhatвҖҷs your role in this story? Well… ThatвҖҷs up to you now.

item.title: The Arson Betrayal зәөзҒ«иғҢеҸӣ
item.description:
The Arson Betrayal [v0.8.0] [Crispy Chicken Productions]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The Arson Betrayal puts you in the shoes of Leo Somerfort (or any name you want). With only an apartment in Ablesmith City and enough cash to pay the bills for a few months, you’ve been working at a cafГ©, hoping to save enough money to be able to go to college. But one fateful encounter plunges you into the middle of a conspiracy filled with lies, betrayal, and violence.
  • “Watch your back. Trust no one.”
  • “Now it begins.”
  • Synopsis
еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The Arson Betrayal is first and foremost a Harem game, centered around a story-focused action-thriller visual novel.
  • Players are given the opportunity to choose which girls they wish to pursue a relationship with (or even none at all), as they spiral down towards the center of a deadly conspiracy.
  • As the story goes, you’ll discover the girls’ different kinks and be given the chance to determine how your relationship with them progresses, romantically or otherwise.
  • A majority of your choices and conversations with characters throughout the story are remembered and may affect the story as you go forward.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

  • Several bug fixes, typo corrections, and improvements.

item.title: Clown Squad е“Ҙи°ӯеёӮ
item.description:
Clown Squad [Prologue] [NoGlory]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The world loves lies вҖ” as long as theyГўre funny, pretty, or heroic. You were never meant to be honest. You were meant to be a clown. A performer. A distraction. A joke. But thereГўs a problem. You physically cannot lie. Jokes are built on exaggeration, nonsense, and falsehood. Comedy is a craft of bending the truth. And you? YouГўre forced to tell it exactly as it is. YouГўre cynical to your core. You think too sharply. You work harder than anyone around you. Your mind is a razor. And because of it вҖ” people treat you worse than someone who has nothing at all. This is a story about a man forced to be funny in a world that hates the truth. And now, for the first time, you get to decide: Will you break or will you break the world?вҖӢ

item.title: Inanna Revenge дјҠеҚ—еЁңзҡ„еӨҚд»Ү
item.description:
Inanna Revenge [Ep.3] [AtemX Games]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In Inanna Revenge, you play as Arthur (customizable name), a 21-year-old young man living a dull and uneventful life with his stepsisterвҖ”until one fateful day, that life comes to an abrupt end. But death doesnвҖҷt mark the end of your journey. A goddess named Ea offers you a chance to be reincarnated into a new world, one brimming with magic and adventure. What seems like the beginning of a fairy tale quickly reveals a harsher reality. To carve out your place in this new world, youвҖҷll need to fight, face countless challenges, make tough decisions, and build meaningful relationships. Will you rise to the occasion, or be consumed by the trials ahead?
Spoiler
  • In Inanna Revenge, you won’t just control your character’s relationships with others, but also shape his personal development. Numerous choices allow you to develop your character into someone compassionate or ruthless, depending on your preferences. These choices will influence how your character interacts with others in various situations. Moreover, you can also affect the mentality of some of your love interests, deciding whether to pursue a romantic relationship with them or guide them into becoming submissive, obedient companions.
  • The game is a Visual Novel with a strong RPG feel. A turn-based combat system will be used to resolve certain conflicts, and your characters will gain levels, allowing them to allocate stat points and learn new skills. You’ll also find puzzles to solve later in the game.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡHoney Select 2
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡEpisode 3
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-01-17

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—

-New content - Episode 3:

    • 1491+ new images
    • 118 new animations
    • 21,250+ new lines of code
    • New music tracks
    • New sound effects
  • Previous content:
    • Added Russian and Simplified Chinese translations for Episodes 1 and 2.
    • Fixed various typos in the French and English texts.
    • It will no longer be possible to access Regina’s ‘revenge’ route if your MC is compassionate and has not shown a desire for revenge in - their previous choices.
    • The king’s letter received during Episode 2 will now appear in your inventory after reading it.
    • All AI-generated images (16) presenting the lore at the start of Episode 1 have been replaced with standard renders.
  • Bug fixes:
    • Fixed an issue with Sylvia’s dialogue when leaving the blacksmith in Cascus, where relationship points were not being properly awarded.
    • Fixed a bug that incorrectly saved one of the choices related to Manon during the bath scene under certain conditions.
    • The "NTS Content" option will no longer appear as both enabled and disabled if you turn it off in one save and then load another save with the option enabled.
  • User Interface:
    • The achievements screen is now accessible during gameplay without needing to return to the main menu.
    • The text corresponding to the percentage of mining and agricultural workers in the ducal codex has been swapped to correctly match the slider used to adjust this parameter.
    • Redesigned the deduction screen after the Deerwood investigation to make it more intuitive.
    • Visual overhaul of the language selection screen at first launch and in the options menu.
    • Visual redesign of the inventory screen.
    • Added a "Translation" section to the "About" screen with links to the translators’ social networks.
    • Added a notification indicating that attribute or skill points are available on character portraits in the relationships screen.
  • Combat system:
    • Added tabs to categorize the MC’s spells by element during combat.
    • Multi-target spells (such as Sylvia’s Lightning Bolt) can now be cancelled, even after selecting an initial target.
    • Level cap increased to 16
    • Level 16 skills have been added
    • Added new mechanics tied to these skills
    • Added new consumable items
  • Miscellaneous:
    • Ren’Py has been updated to version 8.4.1, fixing some bugs and improving performance.
    • When choosing your name, letters beyond the first are no longer forced to lowercase.
    • When choosing Sylvia’s name, names containing "ea" are no longer forbidden.
    • Experience gained by your partners through Inanna’s blessing is now based on your level rather than theirs.
    • Refactored certain parts of the code to better support translations requiring font changes (using non-Latin characters).
    • Files in the TL folder will no longer be archived, making it easier for Russian- and Chinese-speaking players to update translations.

DeveloperпјҲе…ҘжӯЈең°еқҖпјү

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

item.title: New Horizon ж–°еӨ©еҹҹ
item.description:
New Horizon [v0.4 Early] [KawaiiSukebe]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • What does a man have left after his father has gone missing, and his ex-girlfriend relentlessly broke up with him for seemingly no reason at all? An empty heart that lives through a monotonous everyday life. вҖңMeeting you changed my world.вҖқ The fateful encounter got our storyвҖҷs MC, Hirase Tatsuya, involved in something that could shake the whole country, or even the world. Come and unravel the secrets behind the MCвҖҷs missing father and all the unexpected bittersweet encounters with the girls.вҖӢ

item.title: Dark Magic й»‘йӯ”жі•
item.description:
Dark Magic [v0.21.0] [F. Lord]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You grew up in an ordinary family with an ordinary life, except for the fact, you’re the only man alive in the world! You’ve been living among beautiful girls in the Kingdom, yet, you still have no real actions with any girls.
  • Then everything changed when you met The Red Witch.
  • The one who will teach you about the magic power.
  • The one who will pull you into the Dark Magic world.
  • All girls in the Kingdom are awaiting you to meet them.
  • Now it’s your chance to corrupt them all!
  • " This game is huge, hard, and really long, so please take your time playing and enjoy! “вҖӢ

item.title: V.I.R.T.U.E.S. зҫҺеҫ·
item.description:
V.I.R.T.U.E.S. [v17] [NoMeme]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • This is a harem simulator. You, as a young capable college rich kid, versus 7 gorgeous girls with different backgrounds and personalities. The story is not only about sex, but also about romance and love fantasies. Try immerse yourself in the plots, discover more of the girls, and enjoy the feeling of developing your harem.вҖӢ

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡжІҷзӣ’и§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡPlayHome
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡ17
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2023-02-17

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—
  • It has been almost 1 year since we released VIRTUES v16. Back then we really thought v16 would be the last major update of VIRTUES. We used 10 weeks to create an insane amount of content (700+ new pictures and 70+ animated scenes) and thought вҖңthis is it, weвҖҷve put a good end to the journey of VIRTUES. It is not a perfect end, there are regrets, but it is still a good end. We made it. We finish our first project instead of abandoning it halfway. There may be a v17 at some point in the future, but it will be a minor update, you know, like a DLC kind of stuff.вҖқ
  • I kept this thought even until last December, until we really began to develop this v17 update. But as soon as I re-entered the world of VIRTUES, I changed my mind. I realized there were still so many things I want to tell, so many scenes I want to make for those girls, the girls that used to be a big part of my life for more than 2 years.
  • Thus I changed my plan, and I changed it again and again during the last two months. More and more scenes were added, more and more lines were written, and less and less time I slept every day. And in the end, this update became so big that we couldnвҖҷt even imagine it. It became even bigger than v16. It has more than 900+ new pictures and 70+ animated scenes, with the greatest amount of text.
  • V17 is the last major update of VIRTUES. It is the biggest update weвҖҷve ever made, and maybe the lewdest one as well. Still, it is not a perfect end and there are regrets, but we have done our best and we hope you will enjoy our hard work.
  • I will write a post as the final summary of the journey of VIRTUES in a few days. As for now, letвҖҷs just take a brief look at whatвҖҷs new in the update:
  • IreneвҖҷs solo ending
  • The silver kitten finally got her solo ending. Her ending contains two long branches, and each of them leads to a unique happy end. You will help this girl solve her confusion and decide the path of her future. ElisaвҖҷs solo ending
  • Just like her little daughter, this blonde milfвҖҷs solo ending also contains two long branches. This poor lady was deeply wounded from her previous marriage and she really needs you to take her away from the curse from her past.
  • The afterstory of your harem
  • There will be 4 major parts of your haremвҖҷs afterstory: VeraвҖҷs college dream, UnoвҖҷs real family, SenningвҖҷs daily life after her mother left the country, and the Shinyrost mother&daughterвҖҷs male worship. Each of them contains a tremendous amount of harem scenes.

  • Discord
  • Itch.io

item.description:
Oppai Odyssey [v0.5.0a] [Cryoxxx]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You are the captain of the USF starship Agni. Tasked with the mission of exploring uncharted planets in hopes of finding colonization targets, you will have the opportunity to experience the unique races and environments of the universe. Build friendship and share intimacy with your ragtag crew, as you traverse the mysteries of the universe and the nefarious plots of the USF. Oppai Odyssey features completely animated scenes and sexy situations.вҖӢ

item.title: Pale Carnations еә·д№ғйҰЁдҝұд№җйғЁ
item.description:
Pale Carnations [Ch.4 Up.6 Public] [Mutt & Jeff]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In Pale Carnations, step into the shoes of a tightly wound pre-med student pulled head first into a world of debauchery thanks to the influence of a waning childhood friend. As the newest employee at the Carnation Club, navigate your part in a series of cruel erotic games and sexual encounters. Will you give into your sadistic urges and be enticed by the club’s wealth and hedonism? Or perhaps at the end of it all, a flower of romance will bud, pushing you to leave the brothelвҖҷs sordid business behind.
  • Features a variety of intersecting storylines that sees you guide the performance of three women desperately competing for the brothelвҖҷs grand prize, uncover backroom dealings steeped in intrigue, and maneuver the day-to-day social life of a man ill at ease with his basest impulses.

item.title: Bloody Anomaly иЎҖи…ҘејӮеёё
item.description:
Bloody Anomaly [v0.1] [Dejavu]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • The outbreak of the BA26 virus claimed thousands of lives and temporarily wiped out the usual rules. A vaccine with 93% effectiveness restored the illusion of safety, but you were unlucky, one of the 7% for whom it didnвҖҷt work… Well… there was no turning back.
  • Rumors spread that some of the infected were exhibiting strange, almost vampiric behavior.
Spoiler: More
  • Journalist Sera wrote: вҖңThey could no longer eat regular food. Their manners, habits, appetiteвҖҰ everything changed. I donвҖҷt know what was happening to them, but it was terrifying.вҖқ
  • And what about you? Once an orphan with nothing in your pocket, you clawed your way to the top, building a chemical empire and becoming a millionaire. Power, money, knowledge, everything was in your hands. Risk and criminal connections had long been part of your life, just like the church you built in the heart of the city, a towering mansion disguised as a place of worship.
  • And while the rumors kept spreading, no one knew what would happen next. The first wave may have been only a test, and the real consequences had yet to appear.
  • If the second stage of the virus begins, everything could change overnight. Oh… the vaccine does not work on you… And then you will have to choose: fight to survive or be consumed by the virus with no chance of recovery.

item.description:
Harem Hotel [v0.19.1] [Runey]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You’ve inherited your grandfather’s hotel on a foreign continent where everything seems fine on the surface, but rarely is. Develop relationships, skills and your hotel, with 18 beautiful and fleshed out characters. Harem Hotel includes hundreds of fully animated and uncensored lewd scenes, an array of stats, traits, outfits, and upgrades to buy and unlock, dozens of hours of content, over 1,030 unique events, over 32,500 HD images, and way, way more to come.

item.title: That New Teacher йӮЈдҪҚж–°иҖҒеёҲ
item.description:
That New Teacher [v0.8.0] [RogueOne]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You’ve just been hired at a prestigious and unconventional institute of higher learning, known for its ground-breaking curriculum, radical pedagogical methods, and strict disciplinary policies. Your new position is unlike any other: you are The Enforcer.
  • As The Enforcer, you are the sole authority responsible for administering discipline across the student body, with complete discretion. The InstituteвҖҷs enigmatic benefactors have established a controversial behavioral system known as the PARE Program (Performance and Accountability through Reward and Enforcement). This initiative empowers you to manage students through a carefully structured balance of incentives and consequences, based on their academic performance, conduct, and adherence to institutional expectations.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: My Bully Is My Lover жҲ‘зҡ„зҲұдәәжҳҜжҒ¶еҘі
item.description:
My Bully Is My Lover [Chapter 2 - Episode 1 [BETA]] [NiiChan]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In this emotionally charged narrative-driven game, you step into the shoes of a protagonist who has endured the scars of high school bullying. Haunted by memories of a girl who made life unbearable, you’ve journeyed through both literal and metaphorical realms of heaven and hell, reshaping your identity and vowing for retribution. Yet, as adulthood dawns, you realize the futility of clinging to past grudges and choose a path of moving forward.
Spoiler
  • But fate has a twist in store. Your tranquil life is upended when the same high-school bully, along with her friends become your housemates, thanks to your landlady’s new rental arrangements. Unprepared and unnerved, you brace for a resurgence of old conflicts. However, what unfolds is a journey far more profound and unexpected.
  • “My Bully is My Lover” is more than a game; it’s a journey of healing, understanding, and the unexpected ways of life intertwine. Prepare to embark on a path where past pain paves the way for growth and unlikely bonds.

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • A simple boy from the village, having reached adulthood and finished his studies, during his everyday rural routine asks himself the question - вҖңWhat’s next? Will I stay here forever or will I overcome my fears and try my hand in the big city?вҖқ Will the big city lure the young man with sexy girls and great prospects, or will he stay in the village and never experience the world beyond?вҖӢ

item.title: Apocalypse 2059 еҗҜзӨәеҪ•2059
item.description:
Apocalypse 2059 [v0.3 Special] [BigH4nd.Inc]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Apocalypse 2059 Welcome to the savage world of 2059, where survival is a daily struggle and civilization is nothing but a distant memory. The World That Was In 2030, an event known as “The Cataclysm” forever changed the face of Earth. Nuclear weapons claimed lives in an instant, plunging the world into a devastating nuclear winter that lasted over a decade. Civilization, law, and morality crumbled into dust. The surface became an inferno, forcing what little plant life remained to retreat underground. For the few who survived, existence became a constant battle against extinction. Twenty years have passed. The pre-war generation grows old, while a new generation rises, knowing nothing of the world that came before.
Spoiler
  • Your Story Begins The story takes place in the year 2059. You, the protagonist, have been living in solitude in a shelter since your birth. These peaceful days are changed by the appearance of a mysterious woman. At her urgent request, you’ll embark on a perilous journey across the savage lands of what was once civilization. Unforgettable Characters Your path will cross with unique survivors, each shaped by the merciless world they inhabit: A reckless and confident villain with her own agenda A young, sensitive tribal leader struggling to protect her people A ruthless warlord carving out her empire silver-tongued treasure hunter seeking fortune in the ruins

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡHoney Select 2
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡ0.3 Christmas Special
  • еҸ‘иЎҢж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2025-12-24

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—
  • What’s New in Winter Special
  • Step into a completely different world from our usual wasteland - a warm, peaceful winter evening where MC and the characters gather without danger or survival struggles. This standalone episode features:
  • Character Routes:
  • Skylar’s Route
  • Emily’s Route
  • Lana’s Route
  • Content:
  • About 1 hour of new story content
  • 700+ new CGs
  • Completely standalone from the main story
  • Free for everyone, as always
  • About Harlie’s Route
  • I need to be honest with you: Harlie’s route is not included in this release.
  • I know many of you were looking forward to her story, and I’m genuinely sorry for not delivering what I promised. The reasons are straightforward - time management failures and trying to maintain quality standards rather than rushing something subpar.
  • My commitment: Harlie’s complete route will be finished and released as an update in 2026, as part of what should have been in the initial release.
  • I apologize for this disappointment, but I’d rather delay than deliver something that doesn’t do her character justice.

DeveloperпјҲе…ҘжӯЈең°еқҖпјү

  • Itch.io
  • Discord

item.description:
Dawnfall [v0.2] [Zebual]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Dawnfall is a modern fantasy visual novel that follows a young man about to start his university life, unaware that secrets tied to his past and destiny are slowly awakening. Vampires, witches, and angels arenвҖҷt just stories… they exist, hidden within a delicate balance thatвҖҷs beginning to crack. As a member of a secret organization called Veilkeepers, Rex will be forced to face not only the darkness stirring beneath the surfaceвҖҰ but also the truth of who he really is. Your choices will shape fate, maybe even the fate of the world.вҖӢ

item.title: Cradle Beyond the Veil ејӮз•Ңж‘ҮзҜ®
item.description:
City Devil: Restart [v0.4.0 Public] [Sabirow]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • This isnвҖҷt your usual life sim with predictable drama and a checklist of girls toвҖҰ well, you know.
  • Instead, our visual novel offers something for everyone вҖ” from high-quality adult scenes and animations that wonвҖҷt disappoint, to a carefully crafted world and story for those who enjoy deeper immersion. We believe youвҖҷll find plenty to enjoy as you start exploring Cradle at its very beginning.
  • WeвҖҷve aimed to create a visual novel that stands out вҖ” and we believe weвҖҷve built a solid foundation for something truly special. If youвҖҷre curious to explore a story somewhere between fiction and вҖңwait, that could actually happenвҖқ вҖ” welcome.

item.title: Wild Cats йҮҺзҢ«
item.description:
Wild Cats [v0.3 Public] [LopaPhi]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • You are a highly anticipated up and coming volleyball star. Or rather, you were up until you destroyed your shoulder and your prospects along with it by overworking yourself. Now you’re just a nobody who drowned your sorrows away with a series of poor life choices.
Spoiler

  • This story takes place after a wake up call following a year of wallowing in despair with a life that spiralled downhill under the shadow of the star volleyball prospect you once were. You have just received a vague invitation for a meeting from the Dean of Baskerville State University, a highly prestigious university, regarding a potential scholarship when no other universities would give the current you a second glance.

  • The condition of this scholarship however would turn out to be facing your demons as you return to the sport you turned your back on in a new role, becoming the coach of the school’s women’s volleyball team.

  • But little did you know that facing your demons would be the easiest part of this task as the team is riddled with fatal problems, each threatening to end your scholarship left, right, and centre! Yet by earnestly facing these girls and their issues with your eyes wide open, you might just end up growing in a way you never thought you would. Are you ready to coach the BSU Wild Cats and lead them to victory?

item.title: City Devil еҹҺеёӮжҒ¶йӯ”
item.description:
City Devil: Restart [v0.4.0 Public] [Sabirow]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • In a new city, you start a fresh chapter of your life by enrolling in a high school. Embarking on this thrilling journey, you’ll encounter a diverse group of friends, including charming and beautiful girls. As you explore the town and its inhabitants, you will realize something mysterious and disturbing is happening here. Strange people and unexplained phenomena seem to haunt you. MC’s frequent nightmares add a creepy element to the story. As you interact with various characters, you will also have to make decisions that will affect the game’s outcome. Your choices will determine the course of the story and the relationships you form with other characters.

item.title: Heliorise жӣҰеҚҮд№ӢеҹҺ
item.description:
Heliorise [v0.2.1] [JBReverse]

Overview

еү§жғ…жҰӮиҰҒ
  • Since childhood, you’ve been an orphan with no family. But on the day you come of age, a mysterious letter arrives - you have a sister. She lives in the world’s largest city - Heliorise, and sincerely invites you to reunite. Is she truly your long-lost family? Why reach now? What does she want after all these years? Only one thing is certain - your life is about to change forever…

item.title: Astreon жҳҹе®ҝ
item.description:
Astreon [Ch.2 v0.3.5] [NoGlory]

Overview

жёёжҲҸжҰӮиҝ°
  • In the year 2032, humanity stands on the brink of a technological breakthrough. A new material, developed by a group of scientists, possesses not only extraordinary strength, hyper-elasticity, and energy-saving properties, but also a unique, or rather exceptional, ability to self-repair. This capability turned the material into a regenerative pill, allowing people with limited abilities to become fully functional humans, while also making them stronger, smarter, and even extending their lifespan.
Spoiler: More
  • However, fearing the consequences of such power, the scientists decide to destroy the records, reports, and everything related to their research. They scattered, each going their own way. But as is often the case, someone found the remnants of this work. Ignoring the dangers, they decided to complete it, which eventually led to the formation of a globally banned terrorist organization called “Masquerade.” In response, leaders of major corporations launched a large-scale operation to eliminate the individual responsible and eradicate everything related to the research. You are a former soldier, unable to bear the guilt of the atrocities committed during the operation. You retreat to a remote location on the edge of the world, a small town cut off from the rest of civilization, where you planned to live a peaceful life with your wife and children, far removed from all the troubles of the past. But, as often happens, things do not go according to plan. One day, when your wife goes on a business trip to a certain research institute, she suddenly stops contacting you. In an attempt to find out what happened, you embark on a journey. Days, weeks, months, and years pass… Eventually, you come to terms with the fact that you may never see your wife again, burying all your emotions deep inside. Then, one day, your son arrives, asking for your help and with a glimmer of hope that not all is lost, that there is still a small chance to restore your peaceful life.

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

item.title: Mayfly иңүиқЈ
item.description:
Mayfly [v0.2 Reset] [JasonTon]

Overview

жёёжҲҸжҰӮиҝ°

  • “The city’s sewers stink of blood and rust. Portraits of the wealthy and powerful line the streets, attempting to cover up the heinous crimes they’ve committed.”

  • “Is it truly brightness and warmth that meets you after suffering?” your life.

Spoiler

  • The story is set in the city of Devon, the country’s only mega city. Plagued by a glaring wealth gap, Devon eventually divided into the Uppercity, where company execs and corpos live amidst opulence and luxury, and the Undercity, where factory workers and gangsters, including triads, dwell.

  • A decade ago, a phenomenon of unknown origin resulted in the sudden emergence of superpowers among individuals in and around the city, primarily among teenagers. However, this unexpected development presented a formidable challenge for the government, as these superpowered individuals started to engage in criminal activities. In particular, they targeted the Uppercity due to deep-rooted inequality, resorting to acts such as kidnapping and murder of the wealthy.

  • To tackle the rising crime rates, the government is compelled to implement two bills: the Vigilante Act and the Superpowers Act. The former empowers selected individuals with superpowers to go beyond traditional law enforcement measures to combat criminals, while the latter treats superpowered individuals differently from regular humans, eliminating age restrictions and establishing dedicated prisons for them.

  • Over time, superpowered crime in Devon steadily decreased thanks to the state-funded Vigilantes who are entrusted with the task of upholding justice. However, as the Vigilante force expanded, the balance started to shift as some Vigilantes with concealed motives became a new source of instability in the city. Additionally, after the initial surge of superpowers, no new superpowers have emerged in Devon. This results in a growing public demand for the abolition of the Vigilante Bill, and a change in public perception of Vigilantes from once-revered heroes to a more critical stance.

  • In such a setting, where you are a member of the Vigilantes, are you truly willing to let others dictate your fate? I believe the answer is unequivocally “Never.” Every decision you make, whether significant or seemingly inconsequential, has the potential to impact the relationships and alliances you form during your journey.

  • Is it to live fleetingly like a mayfly in this superficially vibrant city, or to leave a lasting legacy as a legend in the streets?

  • “The power to determine your destiny rests in your hands.”

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡи§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ

  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

Changelog

  • 3100+ entirely new lines of story text
  • 6850+ entirely new lines of code
  • 30+ new music tracks

  • New end credits scene
  • The rendering quality has been significantly enhanced
  • Added Volumetric Light/Volumetric Fog
  • Higher-polygon models and new skeletal rigs have been added to the characters, allowing for more refined and detailed body movements
  • The MC’s model and skin have been updated, making him look… more handsome, perhaps?
  • Significant optimizations have been made to the transitions and sound effects in version 0.1, with a revision rate of over 70%
  • A cheat document has been added… Open it, and it will guide you on which choices to make

item.title: Milfy Day еҫҗеЁҳеҚҠиҖҒд№Ӣж—Ҙ
item.description:
Milfy Day [v0.8.9] [Red Lighthouse]

Overview

жёёжҲҸжҰӮиҝ°
  • Milfy Day is a visual novel game, you’ll play as a young man who has just moved into this small town. You’re staying with two hot mature women and their families. Because your family is going through a crisis, you need to revive your family, meet more local residents, help them and discover the secrets of the town. Of course the most important thing is that you have to successfully graduate and find a partner at the school prom.вҖӢ

жёёжҲҸдҝЎжҒҜ

жёёжҲҸзұ»еһӢ

  • жёёжҲҸзҺ©жі•пјҡжІҷзӣ’и§Ҷи§үе°ҸиҜҙ
  • е»әжЁЎеј•ж“ҺпјҡHoney Select 2
  • иҝҗиЎҢеј•ж“ҺпјҡRen’Py
  • жёёжҲҸз”»йЈҺпјҡдәҡжҙІйЈҺ

зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ

  • еҪ“еүҚзүҲжң¬пјҡ0.8.9
  • еҺҹзүҲеҸ‘еёғж—Ҙпјҡ2025-10-16
  • жұүеҢ–еҲҶдә«ж—Ҙпјҡ2025-10-26

Changelog

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙеҝ—
  • New Angelina content.
  • New Zoey content.
  • New Syndra content.
  • A new girl. New dialogues.
  • Text correction.
  • Some renders fixes.
